name: West Coast Turkey Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked turkey, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add green bell pepper, onion, and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
2. Stir in beans, tomatoes, wine, turkey, chili powder, cilantro, red hot pepper flakes, and salt.
3. Increase the heat to high and bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 25 minutes.
4. To serve, garnish with additional onion or fresh cilantro if desired.
Note: If fresh cilantro is unavailable, use 1 teaspoon dried.
